macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Past $77,000 Amid US-Iran Tensions and Ceasefire Hopes
items.summary: Bitcoin topped $77,000 as the crypto market rallied over 1% to $2.55 trillion, fueled by optimism around US-Iran ceasefire negotiations in Islamabad, despite $330 million in total liquidations mostly from shorts.

items.title: Largest US Crypto Exchange Warns of Quantum Computing Threat to Bitcoin Wallets
items.summary: Following Google's alert, Coinbase's advisory board published a paper stating quantum computers could eventually break Bitcoin and Ethereum cryptography, with 6.9 million BTC in vulnerable wallets needing quantum-resistant upgrades.

items.title: Kelp DAO Exploit Triggers $9-13 Billion DeFi Capital Flight from Aave
items.summary: A massive Kelp DAO hack caused panic in DeFi, leading to over $9 billion withdrawn from Aave and heightened systemic risk concerns as exploits mount, while Bitcoin outperforms amid global chaos.

items.title: Bitcoin Breaks $76,000 with $217 Million in Liquidations Ahead of US-Iran Talks
items.summary: Bitcoin and altcoins like XRP gained nearly 2% on April 21 preceding US-Iran negotiations, with $217 million liquidated—65% shorts—signaling bullish rebound toward potential $80,000 target.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Humanoid Robot 'Lightning' Breaks Half-Marathon World Record
items.summary: A humanoid robot named 'Lightning' set a new half-marathon world record in Beijing, finishing in 50 minutes and 26 seconds, over 13 miles faster than any human. The achievement raises concerns about AI advancements in robotics, compared to Tesla's Optimus.

items.title: $100B Amazon-Anthropic Deal Secures Massive Compute Capacity
items.summary: Amazon committed over $100B to Anthropic over 10 years, including 5 gigawatts of compute power equivalent to five nuclear plants, $25B in equity, and over 1M Trainium chips, with Claude's revenue run-rate surging to $30B+. The deal highlights electricity as the key constraint in AI development.

items.title: OpenAI Releases GPT Image 2.0 with Massive Performance Leap
items.summary: OpenAI launched GPT Image 2.0, achieving the largest capability gap over competitors with an ELO rating of 1512, far surpassing others. Rumors suggest a Stealth model, possibly GPT 5.5, may release within 48 hours.

items.title: Unauthorized Access to Anthropic's Powerful Mythos AI Model
items.summary: A small group of unauthorized users accessed Anthropic's new Mythos AI model, described as so advanced it could enable dangerous cyberattacks.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: ARC Raiders Expedition Window Extended and Damage Requirements Revealed
items.summary: Embark Studios has extended the ARC Raiders expedition window to April 28th, 2026, 12:00 p.m. to May 11th, 2026, 8:00 a.m., and revealed damage requirements following player criticism.

items.title: Crimson Desert Map Expansion Appears Likely
items.summary: Pearl Abyss has developed lands beyond the current borders in Crimson Desert, suggesting potential map expansions in future updates.

items.title: Discipline Priest Gets Major Shielding Buff in WoW Patch 12.05
items.summary: World of Warcraft's The War Within Patch 12.05 shifts Discipline Priest toward heavy shielding and bubbling builds in raids and Mythic+, bringing back disc shields.

items.title: Silent Hill 2 VR Mod Receives Major Update with Full Body and New Controls
items.summary: The Silent Hill 2 VR mod now includes a full body with animated hands, improved dodging controls, and pairs with performance mods for enhanced immersion.

items.title: Destiny 2 Weekly Reset: New Patch Notes, Iron Banner, Weapons, and Future Updates
items.summary: Destiny 2's April 21, 2026 weekly reset includes patch notes, Iron Banner, new weapons, Eververse loot, and announcements on future changes including Renegades and Year of Prophecy.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Tim Cook Made $1 Million Bet Days Before Resigning as Apple CEO
items.summary: Apple's former CEO Tim Cook made a $1 million bet just before announcing his resignation in September, following the sale of $16.5 million in AAPL stock. This marks a significant leadership transition at Apple.

items.title: New Amazon Fire Stick Models Reject Non-Amazon Store Apps
items.summary: Upcoming Fire Stick models will only accept apps from Amazon's official store, restricting third-party app installations.

items.title: Mozilla Releases Firefox 150 with Fixes for 271 Vulnerabilities
items.summary: Firefox 150 addresses 271 vulnerabilities identified using early access to advanced tools, with Mozilla warning of a rocky transition for developers amid emerging tech changes.

items.title: Meta Installs Tracking Software on US Employees' Computers for Data Capture
items.summary: Meta is deploying software on US staff computers to track mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes in work apps, intended for training purposes.
